Localization.Description: A user logged in to the system

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} with the {subject.account.privileges} privileges logged in to the system on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} logged in to the system on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.domain}\{subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to the system on host {event_src.host}
